title: United states cattle inventory down 2 percent
summary: There were 98.8 million head of cattle and calves on U.S. farms as of July 1, 2022, according to the Cattle report published today by the U.S. Department of Agriculture’s National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS).

title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: July 21, 2022
summary: July 21, 2022: Over the past week, the sea ice has now decreased by a higher rate of 7.18% from the level on 07/14/2022 of 8.542 M km 2 to 7.929 M km 2 for this week. title: Beachwatchers Wanted for Coastal Observation and Seabird Survey Team (COASST)
summary: On August 7 th from 9:30 am to 12:30 pm PST, the Coastal Observation and Seabird Survey Team (COASST) will deliver a virtual training session for the residents of Alaska. title: New LKTK Database
summary: The LKTK Taskforce has publically released a searchable database of local and traditional knowledge (LKTK) and subsistence information.
